questions.question: Describe the key components of a well-designed learning system, as per basic learning theory. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on inputs, processing, and outputs.

questions.question: What is the primary goal of the learning system in the context of basic learning theory? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the desired outcome of the learning process.

questions.question: Explain the role of feedback in a learning system, as per basic learning theory. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on how feedback affects the learning process and desired outcome.
